name: Movement Mortgage
description_short: Movement Mortgage is a national mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, FHA/VA, jumbo, and specialty loans with a stated goal of fast underwriting and closing.
description_long:
Movement Mortgage is a mortgage lender operating nationally with a local presence in Seattle, WA and other markets. The company positions itself as a customer-focused alternative to traditional mortgage companies, emphasizing speed and simplicity in the lending process.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans, jumbo loans, refinancing, reverse mortgages, renovation and new construction financing, Non-QM and DSCR loans for self-employed borrowers and investors, and first-time homebuyer programs with down payment assistance. They also provide loan servicing through a dedicated department.

Movement Mortgage differentiates itself through stated speed targets: underwriting results within six hours of application, loan processing in seven days, and closing in one day (subject to extenuating circumstances). The company emphasizes a transparent, non-complicated process and employs local loan officers backed by a national team. Beyond lending, Movement has established philanthropic initiatives including GraceWorks (grants to local nonprofits), the Movement Foundation (long-term community investments), and Movement Schools (a network of public charter schools in underserved communities).

While the website presents a strong value proposition and community commitment, specific information about rates, fees, credit requirements, and competitive advantages versus other national lenders is limited. The stated speed targets carry a caveat that extenuating circumstances may cause delays, and refinancing disclosures note that total finance charges may be higher over the loan's life.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Stated goal of providing underwriting results within six hours of receiving an application
Targets seven-day loan processing and one-day closing, emphasizing speed in the mortgage process
Wide range of loan products including FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, reverse mortgages, and specialty loans (Non-QM, DSCR)
First-time homebuyer programs with education, support, and down payment assistance resources
Down payment assistance grants and resources available for qualifying borrowers
Local loan officers paired with national team support for market knowledge and resources
Community-focused company that directs profits to nonprofits, foundations, and charter school networks
cons: Speed guarantees (6-hour underwriting, 7-day processing, 1-day closing) explicitly disclaim that extenuating circumstances may cause delays
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, fees, closing costs, or APR ranges for comparison shopping
No transparent disclosure of credit score requirements, debt-to-income limits, or minimum down payment requirements
Refinancing disclosure notes total finance charges may be higher over the life of the loan than original mortgage
Limited detail on what qualifies borrowers for down payment assistance or first-time homebuyer programs
best_for: Homebuyers and refinancers who prioritize speed and simplicity in the mortgage process
Eligible veterans and active service members seeking VA loans with no down payment requirements
Self-employed borrowers and real estate investors seeking Non-QM and DSCR loan options
First-time homebuyers seeking education resources and down payment assistance programs
diagnosis: Movement Mortgage is best suited for homebuyers and refinancers who value speed, transparency, and local service from a lender with national resources. The main caveat is that stated processing speed guarantees explicitly disclaim delays from extenuating circumstances, and the company does not transparently publish rates, fees, or credit requirements on their website, requiring direct contact with loan officers for pricing.
services: FHA loans with flexible credit and down payment options
VA loans with no down payment for eligible veterans and service members
Conventional loans with competitive rates and flexible terms
Refinancing (rate/term, cash-out, and payment adjustment options)
Non-QM loans for self-employed or non-traditional income borrowers
DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for investors
First-time homebuyer programs with education and support
Down payment assistance with local grants and resources
Loan servicing with dedicated servicing department
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2701 Eastlake Ave E UNIT 105, Seattle, WA 98102
meta_description: Movement Mortgage is a national lender offering home purchase, refinance, FHA/VA, jumbo, and specialty loans with fast underwriting.
